searchStringTemplates: "React Engineer" TypeScript remote "open to" OR "worldwide" OR "Europe" OR "India"
"Software Engineer" frontend React TypeScript GraphQL remote
React Next.js Tailwind TypeScript senior remote hire
Vite React TypeScript senior engineer remote

notes.timezoneStrategy: Europe Remote roles (CET/CEST) have 3.5hr overlap with IST √¢¬Ä¬î favorable. US Remote roles on EST have ~10.5hr gap; look for async-first companies. US PST gap is 13.5hrs √¢¬Ä¬î flag these as harder unless fully async.

salaryBenchmarks.USARemote: $120K√¢¬Ä¬ì$220K for senior level (via platforms like Arc.dev or direct)

notes.nicheAdvantage: Three.js + GSAP is a rare combo √¢¬Ä¬î search 'animation engineer', 'creative technologist', 'WebGL engineer' for differentiated roles with less competition. Design-system experience opens roles at Atlassian, Shopify, CRED specifically.
